Rimba Nusantara Energy Berhad — Operational/Cyber Incident Report and PDPA Compliance Memo (internal, Malaysia)
2026-06-01 09:30 MYT; Incident Ref: IR-20 26- 0601-A; Prepared by En. Farid Iqbal (SecOps), reviewed by Pn. Aisha Karim (DPO)
Summary: On 2026-05-30, a staging document library briefly exposed vendor onboarding Form B for 13 applicants; fields were limited to names and corporate emails pursuant to minimisation and no MyKad numbers or bank details were collected
Containment: Access revoked within 19 minutes; logs show no exfiltration; no login credentials, passwords, or MAC addresses were disclosed
Bursa/CMSA assessment: Under Bursa LR 9.03 and CMSA insider trading provisions, the non-public info is not price-sensitive and does not constitute MNPI; no immediate announcement or trading blackout required; no material adverse change (MAC)
Cross-border transfer: DPA Schedule 2 permits processing by CloudCascara Pte Ltd (SG data centre); Data Export Approval DEA-2 4 - 7 L completed; transfers were paused and resumed post-addendum execution
PDPA s.129 controls: Binding contractual clauses and consent-based safeguards applied; no transfer occurred to any jurisdiction without equivalent protection; we did not rely on a whitelist
DSAR: Employee access request from Mr. Liew Zhen Yu received 2026-05-31 via dsar@rimba- nusantara.my and fulfilled 2026-06-01 with system-of-record extracts and access logs
Consent withdrawal and erasure: Candidate Ms. Nurul Hani withdrew consent for onboarding on 2026-05-31; erasure completed (ticket E-07 1F) and verified across backup snapshots within 48 hours
Retention: Per DPA Schedule 3, onboarding drafts retain 30 days then purge; early purge executed for affected folder; optional fields in Form B are now hidden by default (minimisation)
ESG/financing: Keris Capital Partners Sdn Bhd notified under facility covenant 14.2 (cyber incident reporting); green performance margin and sustainability KPIs are unaffected; this memo is not a public disclosure
Security posture: Vulnerability scan and permissions review completed; control closed; policy-only hardening described here does not indicate an ongoing risk condition
Contacts: Pn. Aisha Karim, DPO, privacy@rimba-nusantara.my, +60 3-0000 0000; Bursa liaison: corpsec@rimba-nusantara.my
Supporting docs: https://intra.rimba-nusantara.my/ir?ticket=IR-20 26%2F0601-A&sec=app_pr ivacy and deal room https://deal.rne-bhd.local/room?id=ZK- 1 7 3 %2Fprod; for internal circulation only
